title: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
scenario: Custom Quick Settings display empty on Device Home Screen when all options are deselected but toggle remains ON
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and pair a Bluetooth headset.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Select 1–3 quick setting options (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer).
6. Return to the Device Home Screen.
7. Verify the selected quick settings are displayed on the home screen.
8. Navigate back to Device Settings → Quick Settings Selection.
9. Deselect all quick setting options (but keep the Quick Settings toggle ON).
11. Return to the Device Home Screen.
expected: When 1–3 options are selected and saved, those quick settings appear on the Device Home Screen. When all options are deselected (toggle ON), no quick settings are shown on the home screen.
